name: AI Maintenance Skills
summary: Drupal.org issue-triage and maintenance workflows for coding agents within a constrained DDEV design.

provenance.note: The supplied discussion identified the project's maintenance tasks and two-container trust boundary as reusable prior art.

artifacts.name: Drupal issue maintenance workflow and trust boundary
artifacts.question_answered: Can an external coding agent safely triage and prepare Drupal.org maintenance work that reduces total maintainer burden?
artifacts.mapping_note: This is workflow prior art. Promote a separately defined local task only after fixing its inputs, observable completion criteria, evaluator, decision target, and stop condition.
artifacts.claim_boundary: The workflow description does not provide a locally reproduced Agent Readiness result or a formal evaluator, so it cannot enter the scorecard directly.
